createTable.remarks: Represents the latest facility id value

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS facility_identifier CASCADE;

createTable.remarks: Represents the facility data stored in the system

column.name: account_id
column.remarks: The target unit account the facility belongs to

column.name: created_date
column.remarks: The date the facility was created

column.name: excluded_date
column.remarks: The date the facility was excluded

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS facility_data CASCADE;

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE facility_identifier ALTER COLUMN id TYPE bigint;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE facility_identifier ALTER COLUMN id TYPE int;

column.name: charge_start_date
column.remarks: Start date of paying the subsistence fee

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS facility_address CASCADE;

column.name: site_name
column.remarks: Site Name as defined in the most recently activated UnA

column.name: scheme_exit_date
column.remarks: Scheme Exit Date determines whether the facility will be invoiced for subsistence fees

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.comment: Use temporary column in facility_address to facilitate migration of data from una

changeSet.author: loukerip@unisystems.gr
changeSet.comment: Use temporary column in facility_address to facilitate migration of data
